name: 05-16-bounded-source-vector-to-rvv-selected-boundary-lowering
title: Bounded source-vector-to-RVV selected-boundary lowering
description: Implement a plugin-owned bounded source-shape recognizer for the existing RVV i32m1 add source-seed route so selected-boundary materialization is authorized by the source function signature/body, not marker metadata alone.
